evidence: The prescreening comprises three NLP models working independently; these are BioLinkBERT-Base, BioELECTRA-Base, and BioLinkBERT-Base incorporating Adapter. A proposal is filtered out if and only if all three models classify it as belonging to the bottom class independently.

evidence: The paper uses large language models (LLMs) and natural language processing (NLP) to analyze central bank speeches. title: Noisy Politics, Quiet Technocrats: Strategic Silence by Central Banks

evidence: The paper uses GPT to generate dictionaries for measuring innovation, impact, and replicability in text analysis (scale development) and to generate synthetic text data for predicting outcomes in public sector innovation contests.
